title: FakePlayer-folia
body:
This is a fork of [tanyaofei/minecraft-fakeplayer](https://github.com/tanyaofei/minecraft-fakeplayer)
, modified for Folia server compatibility and enhanced with some additional features.

_⚠️ Note: Due to the added features, the configuration files in this fork are not compatible with the original plugin._

Key Features:

- Fake player support on Folia servers
- Maintains the core functionality of the original FakePlayer
- Additional features added (configuration not compatible with the original)
- Ideal for developers for plugin testing or automated scenarios

If you encounter any issues or have suggestions, please report them here:
https://github.com/Pstar233/minecraft-fakeplayer-folia/issues

Repository:
https://github.com/Pstar233/minecraft-fakeplayer-folia
